summary.failureReason: Sandbox isolation prevents spawning unsandboxed agents. Heimdall cron runs in sandboxed mode which restricts access to agents configured with unsandboxed runtime.

recommendation: Health check should run from unsandboxed context (non-cron or gateway-hosted cron) to properly test all Norse agents. Alternatively, configure all agents to support sandboxed runtime.

previousSuccessfulChecks.note: Prior health checks from non-sandboxed context show all 6 agents completed successfully
